lint.command: N/A (no lint command in services.yaml; compiler warnings noted)
lint.detail: Build warnings present in drawing/lib.rs, fonts/rasterize.rs, render/scene_render.rs (unused variables, unused imports). No errors. No dedicated lint tool configured in services.yaml.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Implicit close only handles the LAST contour in multi-contour unclosed paths. When multiple contours lack Close commands, only the final contour gets an implicit closing segment. Low practical impact since well-formed paths use Close commands.
Pre-allocating vec![PathSegment; 4096] (64KB) on every path render call. For scenes with many small path nodes, this could add up. Consider reusable buffer for optimization.
f32_to_fp casts f32 to i32 without NaN/infinity guarding. Not required by validation contract but noted for future hardening.

VAL-CROSS-04 (interactive editing) could not be directly verified — sendkey doesn't reach virtio-keyboard in headless mode. Worker's code-unchanged argument is valid for this milestone but future milestones changing interactive paths will need a keystroke injection solution.

Pre-existing display freeze: compositor stops presenting new frames after initial boot frame. Clock frozen, framebuffer pixel-identical after 30+ seconds. Hypothesis: MSG_PRESENT_DONE signal lost, causing compositor deadlock. Not a regression from this milestone.
STEM_DARKENING_BOOST and STEM_DARKENING_LUT defined identically in both rasterize.rs and cache.rs. Pre-existing DRY violation that could lead to divergence.
system/DESIGN.md has 4 stale FillRect references (lines 277, 279, 321, 322). Documentation drift from implementation.
system/DESIGN.md and README.md still reference 'subpixel rendering' and 'LCD subpixel rendering'. Documentation drift from implementation.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated GlyphCache size from ~1.3 MiB to ~238 KiB (grayscale AA migration)
Fixed Node size from 72B to 96B (was already incorrect pre-mission)
Added Content::Path variant to Content Type Field Layout and Key Types sections
Corrected sendkey limitation: both QMP input-send-event AND monitor sendkey fail to reach virtio-keyboard in headless mode. Interactive testing requires QEMU display window.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the visual testing section (Step 6) to note that sendkey does NOT route to virtio-keyboard in headless/nographic mode. Workers should verify initial-frame rendering rather than expecting interactive input. Consider adding guidance for when interactive testing is truly needed (requires display window, not automated).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All four features' workers (subpixel-removal, fillrect-removal, path-content-type, content-types-integration) encountered the sendkey limitation. Integration worker explicitly flagged this in skillFeedback.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding convention: workers should fix compiler warnings (unused variables, unused imports) in files they touch, to prevent warning accumulation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Build produces warnings in drawing/lib.rs (1), fonts/rasterize.rs (3), render/scene_render.rs (8). Some pre-existing, some introduced by content-types workers. Multiple reviewers noted this pattern.

rejectedObservations.observation: system/DESIGN.md and README.md still reference subpixel rendering and FillRect
rejectedObservations.reason: Code documentation (not .factory infrastructure). Should be updated by workers when they next touch those files. Not a shared state concern for the scrutiny validator.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker transcript skeleton had null fields (fillrect-removal session)
rejectedObservations.reason: Recording system limitation, not a worker or convention issue.

rejectedObservations.observation: Path rasterizer uses Vec heap allocations inside render loop (consistent with existing patterns)
rejectedObservations.reason: Performance observation only, consistent with codebase conventions. Not actionable.

rejectedObservations.observation: Pre-existing display freeze after initial boot frame
rejectedObservations.reason: Pre-existing issue not caused by this milestone. Already documented in integration worker's handoff discoveredIssues. Should be tracked in design journal, not .factory/library.
